# api/data/

JSON snapshots of the workhorse datalake that the API consumes directly.
**Auto-generated — do not hand-edit.**

| File | Generated by | Source |
|---|---|---|
| `lake-courses.json` | `npm run sync-datalake` (root) | `gdrive5tb:workhorse-datalake/latest/courses.csv` |
| `career-pathways.json` | `npm run sync-datalake` (root) | `gdrive5tb:workhorse-datalake/latest/course_career_pathways.csv` |

To refresh after the workhorse Mac publishes a new snapshot:

```bash
npm run sync-datalake   # regenerates both files + the frontend mirrors
npm run index-courses   # re-pushes the merged corpus into Meilisearch
```

These files are committed so the API can serve `/api/careers/*` and the
indexer can run without needing an rclone-configured machine.
